Knowledge Base

Python SDK

Complete reference for the Mnemosyne Python API.

Memory Class

Constructor

Memory(
  db_path: str = "./mnemosyne.db",
  embedding_model: str = "text-embedding-3-small",
  api_key: str | None = None,
  max_working: int = 1000,
  consolidation_interval: int = 3600,
  encryption_key: str | None = None,
  config_path: str | None = None,
) -> Memory

remember

Store a memory in Working Memory.

remember(
  content: str,
  tags: list[str] = [],
  importance: float = 0.5,
  source: str = "user",
  session_id: str | None = None,
) -> str  # Returns memory ID

recall

Retrieve relevant memories using hybrid search.

recall(
  query: str,
  top_k: int = 10,
  tags: list[str] | None = None,
  since: str | None = None,
  vector_weight: float = 0.5,
  text_weight: float = 0.3,
  temporal_weight: float = 0.2,
) -> list[MemoryResult]

get

Retrieve a specific memory by ID.

get(id: str) -> MemoryEntry | None

update

Update an existing memory.

update(
  id: str,
  content: str | None = None,
  importance: float | None = None,
  tags: list[str] | None = None,
) -> bool

forget

Delete a memory.

forget(id: str) -> bool

forget_all

Bulk delete by criteria.

forget_all(
  tags: list[str] | None = None,
  since: str | None = None,
  before: str | None = None,
) -> int  # Returns count deleted

Semantic Memory API

add_fact

Store a structured fact.

add_fact(
  subject: str,
  predicate: str,
  object: str,
  confidence: float = 1.0,
  valid_from: str | None = None,
) -> str  # Returns fact ID

query_facts

Query the temporal knowledge graph.

query_facts(
  subject: str | None = None,
  predicate: str | None = None,
  object: str | None = None,
  current_only: bool = True,
) -> list[Fact]

traverse

Graph traversal from a starting entity.

traverse(
  subject: str,
  predicate: str | None = None,
  depth: int = 1,
) -> list[FactPath]

Statistics

stats() -> MemoryStats

# MemoryStats fields:
# - working_count: int
# - episodic_count: int
# - semantic_count: int
# - db_size_mb: float
# - last_sleep_at: datetime | None
# - consolidated_count: int
# - evicted_count: int

Exceptions

ExceptionRaised When
MemoryNotFoundErrorID does not exist
DatabaseErrorSQLite operation fails
EmbeddingErrorEmbedding generation fails
ConfigurationErrorInvalid config or env vars
EncryptionErrorEncryption/decryption fails
Type Hints

The Python SDK includes full type hints. Use a type checker (mypy, pyright) for static analysis and IDE autocomplete.

© 2026 Mnemosyne. Built by Abdias Moya.
